text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 2 

CMR_DELIVERY_METHOD 

LABEL: Comprehensive Medication Review (CMR) delivery method 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the delivery method for the comprehensive medication review (CMR). 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 01 = Face-to-face 
02 = Telephone 
03 = Telehealth consultation (e.g., video conferencing) 
99 =
